links.title: S3 path to source directory
Product history record from the CDSE traceability service

vh.alternate:name: S3
vh.title: VH: Vertical transmit, horizontal receive
vh.description: Amplitude of vertically polarized signal received horizontally.

vv.alternate:name: S3
vv.title: VV: Vertical transmit, vertical receive
vv.description: Amplitude of vertically polarized signal received vertically.

schema-product-vh.alternate:name: S3
schema-product-vh.title: VH product Schema
schema-product-vh.description: Main source of band's metadata, including: state of the platform during acquisition, image properties, Doppler information, geographic location, etc.

schema-product-vv.alternate:name: S3
schema-product-vv.title: VV product Schema
schema-product-vv.description: Main source of band's metadata, including: state of the platform during acquisition, image properties, Doppler information, geographic location, etc.

schema-calibration-vh.alternate:name: S3
schema-calibration-vh.title: VH calibration Schema
schema-calibration-vh.description: Calibration metadata including calibration details and lookup tables for beta nought, sigma nought, gamma, and digital numbers used in absolute product calibration.

schema-calibration-vv.alternate:name: S3
schema-calibration-vv.title: VV calibration Schema
schema-calibration-vv.description: Calibration metadata including calibration details and lookup tables for beta nought, sigma nought, gamma, and digital numbers used in absolute product calibration.

cdse-s3.title: Copernicus Data Space Ecosystem S3
cdse-s3.description: This endpoint provides access to EO data which is stored on the object storage of both CloudFerro Cloud and OpenTelekom Cloud (OTC). See the [documentation](https://documentation.dataspace.copernicus.eu/APIs/S3.html) for more information, including how to get credentials.

creodias-s3.title: CREODIAS S3
creodias-s3.description: Comprehensive Earth Observation Data (EODATA) archive offered by CREODIAS as a commercial part of CDSE, designed to provide users with access to a vast repository of satellite data without predefined quota limits.

links.title: S3 path to source directory
Product history record from the CDSE traceability service
